violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety certified with RIDOH. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

The ceiling tiles in the dining area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Tiles appeared torn due to water damage/leak. Area was observed blocked off. PIC stated work order has been placed for tiles. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024
